itinerary.title: Premium Romantic Mizoram Honeymoon
itinerary.tagline: Aizawl Mountain Sanctuary • Sunset Vistas • Cultural Harmony • Serene Getaways
itinerary.overview:
TRAGUIN PREMIUM ROMANTIC MIZORAM HONEYMOON — Aizawl Mountain Sanctuary • Sunset Vistas • Cultural Harmony • Serene Getaways. 05 Nights / 06 Days Romantic Mizoram Honeymoon Sanctuary.

TOUR OVERVIEW
Begin your life together in the quiet, mist-covered, and enchanting hills of Mizoram with our TRAGUIN curated honeymoon sanctuary. Designed for intimacy and calm, this Romantic Mizoram retreat combines private luxury accommodations, serene mountain vistas, and curated cultural experiences, guaranteeing unforgettable memories in Northeast India's most tranquil landscape.
itinerary.seo_title: MZ-008 | Premium Romantic Mizoram Honeymoon | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Mizoram package (MZ-008 / TRG-MIZ-ROM-2026): Aizawl Mountain Sanctuary • Sunset Vistas • Cultural Harmony • Serene Getaways with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 01: ARRIVAL IN AIZAWL & INTIMATE WELCOME
TRAGUIN curated Premium Romantic Mizoram Honeymoon with handpicked premium stays
Vehicle / Meals: Luxury SUV / MAPAI (Breakfast & Dinner)

days.title: ARRIVAL IN AIZAWL & INTIMATE WELCOME
days.description: Arrive in Aizawl. Your private chauffeur transfers you to a handpicked, intimate boutique retreat. Enjoy a quiet, romantic welcome dinner overlooking the city valley.
activities: Private chauffeur to intimate boutique retreat.
Romantic welcome dinner overlooking city valley.

days.title: SERENE CULTURAL EXPLORATION
days.description: Enjoy a slow-paced discovery of Aizawl's cultural treasures at a comfortable pace, ensuring quality time together in the tranquil mountain air.
activities: Quality time together in tranquil mountain air.

days.title: MOUNTAIN VIEW SOJOURN
days.description: A relaxing excursion to scenic viewpoints, surrounded by lush forests and fresh mountain mist. Perfect for capturing breathtaking landscapes as a couple.
activities: Lush forests and mountain mist — couple photography.

days.title: QUIET VALLEY RETREAT
days.description: Spend a peaceful day enjoying the scenic beauty of a secluded valley retreat, sharing quality time away from the bustle of city life.
activities: Peaceful quality time away from city bustle.

days.title: FAREWELL CANDLELIGHT DINNER
days.description: A final day for relaxation, culminating in an intimate candlelight farewell dinner at a private garden terrace, creating unforgettable memories.
activities: Intimate candlelight farewell dinner at private garden terrace.
Meals Included: MAPAI Breakfast & Candlelight Dinner

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer to the airport, concluding your romantic Mizoram sojourn.

inclusions.text: Premium Stays: 5 Nights in handpicked Mizoram properties as per chosen category.
Luxury Transportation: Private dedicated Luxury SUV for all transfers and sightseeing.
Curated Meal Plan: MAPAI — daily breakfast and dinner at handpicked venues.
TRAGUIN Support: 24/7 dedicated guest experience manager on call.
Private Transfers: Airport/railway arrival and departure transfers in premium AC vehicle.
Handpicked Stays: TRAGUIN-vetted accommodations matching your selected tier.
All applicable taxes, driver allowances, tolls, and parking charges for the private vehicle.
Romantic experiences including candlelight dinner and private scenic viewpoint excursions for couples.
Airfare, domestic flight bookings, or train tickets.
Monument entry tickets, camera permits, or sanctuary entry fees.
Personal expenses such as laundry, phone calls, drinks, and tips.
Travel insurance, medical expenses, and any emergency evacuation costs.
